_meta.recalibrate_after: 60 days of live daily P&L data
known_calibration_flags: 6160.HK vix=-0.020/pt is aggressive: 15pt shock = -30% from VIX alone. Review after 2 earnings cycles.
Expected portfolio return (-20.8%) reflects 70% probability weight on negative scenarios. Revisit scenario probs if macro regime shifts.
HK ERP=7.25% (US base 5% + China CRP 2.25%) is Damodaran-methodology; recalibrate if HKD peg regime changes.

risk_off.name: Risk-off 全面收缩
risk_off.description: 全球避险情绪爆发，美元大幅走强，中美利率双升，VIX飙升

china_stimulus.name: China stimulus 中国刺激
china_stimulus.description: PBOC降息+财政扩张，人民币升值，风险偏好改善

fed_hike.description: 美国通胀反弹，美联储重启加息，EM资金外流，港股估值压缩
